tooltip_summary.title: Tab Orientation
tooltip_summary.business_question: What is this tab for, and which decision should I make here?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Verify selected context, then use the main KPI/graph below for decisioning.

tooltip_summary.title: Topline KPI Row
tooltip_summary.business_question: Do spend and incremental outcomes justify action now?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: If KPI signal is mixed, inspect Sales Impact and Insights before reallocating.

tooltip_summary.title: Quick Actions
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which module should I open next to answer the current planning question?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Open the module matching your current decision intent (impact, curve, allocation, simulation).

tooltip_summary.title: Monthly Incremental Trend
tooltip_summary.business_question: When in the year did incremental sales accelerate or stall?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Investigate channel-level contributions for abnormal months.

tooltip_summary.title: Channel Mix
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which channels currently create the largest share of incremental impact?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Use Response Curves to confirm headroom before scaling top-share channels.

tooltip_summary.title: Cross-Product ROAS
tooltip_summary.business_question: How does this product’s efficiency compare with peers?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: If lagging peers, run allocator and scenario simulations for recovery options.

tooltip_summary.title: Model Credibility KPIs
tooltip_summary.business_question: Is the model quality adequate for planning decisions?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: If KPI signal is mixed, inspect Sales Impact and Insights before reallocating.

tooltip_summary.title: Annual Volume Impact
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which channels contributed most each month in relative terms?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Investigate months with abrupt share shifts using channel absolute contributions.

tooltip_summary.title: Channel Contributions
tooltip_summary.business_question: What is the absolute incremental impact by channel over time?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Use Response Curves to verify if top absolute contributors still have marginal headroom.

tooltip_summary.title: Next Step Prompt
tooltip_summary.business_question: What is the recommended next workflow step?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Follow prompt only after validating current tab’s key evidence.

tooltip_summary.title: Primary Response Curves
tooltip_summary.business_question: Where is additional spend still productive?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Shift marginal budget toward steeper curves, then validate in allocator.

tooltip_summary.title: Per-Channel Metric Cards
tooltip_summary.business_question: What are current spend, response, and efficiency signals per channel?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Carry shortlisted channels into allocator constraints.

tooltip_summary.title: Marginal ROI View
tooltip_summary.business_question: What does the next unit of spend likely return right now?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Set or confirm channel-level stop/go thresholds using mROI ranking.

tooltip_summary.title: Saturation View
tooltip_summary.business_question: How close is each channel to its practical ceiling?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Reallocate from >70% saturation channels to lower-saturation channels if mROI also supports it.

tooltip_summary.title: Scenario Builder (Optimize)
tooltip_summary.business_question: What constraints and objective should shape the optimized plan?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Set realistic min/max by channel, then run and inspect optimization metrics.

tooltip_summary.title: Optimization Delta Table
tooltip_summary.business_question: Is the recommended allocation materially better than current?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: If uplift is material, export and validate via simulator sensitivity checks.

tooltip_summary.title: Scenario Results Table
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which specific channels increase or decrease in the optimized plan?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Flag large positive/negative deltas for commercial team validation.

tooltip_summary.title: Budget Split Chart
tooltip_summary.business_question: How does spend share shift between current and optimized allocation?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Use this chart to present high-level reallocation story to stakeholders.

tooltip_summary.title: Planned Scenario Panel
tooltip_summary.business_question: Is this scenario packaged and ready to transfer to simulation/approval?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Save with explicit objective and date context, then open in Simulator.

tooltip_summary.title: Scenario Builder (What-If)
tooltip_summary.business_question: What happens if I manually nudge channel spends up or down?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Stress high-risk channels before approval.

tooltip_summary.title: Simulator Header & Saved Scenarios
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which scenario baseline am I currently testing?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Confirm scenario name/version before interpreting any metric deltas.

tooltip_summary.title: Channel Multipliers Panel
tooltip_summary.business_question: How do manual multiplier changes alter expected outcome by channel?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Test downside and upside bands for top reallocated channels.

tooltip_summary.title: Simulator Outcome Metrics
tooltip_summary.business_question: Do manual assumptions preserve value uplift?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: If uplift is material, export and validate via simulator sensitivity checks.

tooltip_summary.title: Insight Headline & Trust
tooltip_summary.business_question: What is the headline recommendation and how much should I trust it?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: If trust is weak, review diagnostics and run conservative pilot.

tooltip_summary.title: Channel Radar
tooltip_summary.business_question: How do channels compare across multiple dimensions at once?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Use radar to avoid over-optimizing on one metric only.

tooltip_summary.title: Efficiency Frontier
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which channels lie on the efficient spend-vs-return frontier?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Target channels below frontier for corrective action.

tooltip_summary.title: Adstock / Carryover
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which channels create delayed impact and how long does it persist?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Adjust pacing for channels with long carryover to avoid over-frequency.

tooltip_summary.title: Recommendations
tooltip_summary.business_question: What concrete business action is suggested from current model evidence?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Translate recommendation into a scenario and validate in Simulator.

tooltip_summary.title: Diagnostics
tooltip_summary.business_question: Do diagnostics reveal reasons to limit confidence in the recommendation?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: If red flags appear, run conservative pilot and revisit model.

tooltip_summary.title: Configuration Selection
tooltip_summary.business_question: Am I evaluating the correct market/product/version/tier before making decisions?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Lock selection before sharing outputs externally.

tooltip_summary.title: Model Quality One-Pager
tooltip_summary.business_question: Is this model fit for operational use?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: If below threshold, prefer conservative changes or alternate version.

tooltip_summary.title: Efficiency Chart
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which channels over- or under-deliver relative to spend share?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Rebalance budget from persistently <1.0 channels toward >1.0 channels with headroom.

tooltip_summary.title: Driver Contribution
tooltip_summary.business_question: What proportion of outcome is explained by each driver category?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Investigate any large driver shift before committing big allocation changes.

tooltip_summary.title: Territory Map
tooltip_summary.business_question: Which territories show strongest or weakest modeled effects?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Use map outliers to prioritize deeper territory review.

tooltip_summary.title: Territory Detail Table
tooltip_summary.business_question: How do territories compare on channel-specific effect metrics?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Build regional action list from top/bottom territory clusters.

tooltip_summary.title: Channel Dispersion
tooltip_summary.business_question: How uneven is channel effect across territories?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: High-dispersion channels should get region-specific planning.

tooltip_summary.title: Advanced Tier Lock
tooltip_summary.business_question: Why is territory analysis unavailable and what unlocks it?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Go to Settings and switch to Advanced tier when available.

tooltip_summary.business_question: What is this tab for, and which decision should I make here?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Verify selected context, then use the main KPI/graph below for decisioning.

tooltip_summary.title: Dashboard Context Selectors
tooltip_summary.business_question: Am I looking at the right country, product, and time period?
tooltip_summary.one_line_value: Verify country/product/year before interpreting any dashboard data. Use theme toggle for presentation preferences.
